sections.paragraph:
ποτήριον, ου, τό [πίνω via ποτήρ ‘drinking cup’] cup

—a. as domestic item used for drinking Mt 10:42; 23:25f; Mk 7:4; 9:41; 14:23; 1 Cor 10:16, 21; 11:25a; Rv 17:4. By metonymy, cup for contents Lk 22:20b; 1 Cor 11:25b, 26.

—b. in imagery

—α. of exposure to suffering or hardship as fulfillment of one’s destiny Mt 20:22f; 26:39; Mk 10:38f; Lk 22:42; J 18:11.

—β. of the cup of divine judgment Rv 14:10; 16:19; 18:6.
